query:
SELECT 
  u.id as userId, 
  u.email, 
  u.name, 
  u.role, 
  u.status,
  u.mustChangePassword,
  e.id as companyId,
  e.companyCode,
  e.companyName,
  e.companyNameEn,
  e.plan
FROM users u
JOIN erp_companies e ON u.erpCompanyId = e.id
WHERE u.email = 'manager@casavivafurniture.com';
